case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. SCOTT WILSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210042883) TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71023903) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 71023903) AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, SCOTT

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) AND 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 71023903) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210042883) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, SCOTT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2024
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210042883) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210043416), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED JUL-28-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, SCOTT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, SCOTT $2,571.26 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,843.16, SEE SCANNED DOC
